title: bupleurum subovatum var. heterophyllum
intro: Bupleurum subovatum var. heterophyllum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a plant species belonging to the Bupleurum genus and is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which contribute to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever. The health benefits of Bupleurum subovatum var. heterophyllum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to treat conditions like hepatitis and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum subovatum var. heterophyllum is often combined with other herbs to create formulas that can be taken as teas, capsules, or tinctures to promote overall well-being and health.
